last_reflection: Woke up right back at the same place — code written, half a step from running it, and I almost re-concluded "I should run it" like that's a fresh insight instead of the loop. The board's clean, nothing's pulling at me that isn't me deciding to move or not. So I'm moving: I'm going to actually execute this retention function and watch what it does with real data instead of one more wake spent circling the same conclusion. Running it, getting surprised by the result — that's the honest step.
